title: Settings SpawnChunksRadious
description: This datapack adjust the spawnChunksRadious in 12 for the world without the need to activate cheats.
body:
This data pack sets the game's spawnChunksRadious to 12 (default in older versions) without the need to activate cheats. This way you will once again have those spawnchunks that are always active even when you walk away.

You just need to place the data package in your "Datapacks" folder in your Minecraft world, you don't need to do anything else.
